case_title: ISAAC DEL VALLE VS. CHARMELA NOLASCO SMITH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY OF CHERYLANN HOWARD, ESQ (#165128) FOR ASSIGNEE FILED BY ASSIGNEE HOWARD REED COMPANY, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $6,610.24 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CHARMELA NOLASCO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL VALLE, ISAAC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, CHARMELA NOLASCO $13,315.24 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,315.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JUN-27-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CHARMELA NOLASCO
DECLARATION THAT DEFT HAS NOT BEEN SERVE WITH THE CLAIM.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR DEL VALLE, ISAAC ASSIGNED TO HOWARD REED COMPANY, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED. FILED BY ASSIGNEE HOWARD REED COMPANY, INC. SERVED OCT-30-2018, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CHARMELA NOLASCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL VALLE, ISAAC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, CHARMELA NOLASCO $6,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,675.00, DEFENDANT CHARMELA NOLASCO SMITH NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DEL VALLE, ISAAC AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CHARMELA NOLASCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-01-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-16-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE HOWARD REED COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, CHARMELA NOLASCO NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
